rationale: The implementation faithfully fulfills all constraints of the frozen v15 Task 4a scope. The committed inventory accurately represents the exact AM-40 package-roots ruling, DOC_ROOTS exclusions, exact per-weaver REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS, and the deep-frozen LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS mapping exactly as specified. Per D17/AM-17, only the git and code weavers' accepted closures are derived and committed. The lexical scanner strictly enforces the closed source profile (AM-41) failing securely on constraints b1-b6. The ONE shared D33 classifier/resolver correctly governs both mechanisms. All functionality is proven through thorough unit/fixture suites, passing the deterministic verifier gate, without expanding scope into LATER tasks.
